overview.headlineHtml: An easy Marbella base in Golf Valley
copy: Nueva Andalucía Suites is for buyers who want a practical Marbella base close to golf, restaurants and Puerto Banús.
The homes are designed to be easy to use and maintain, making them well suited to international owners and regular visits.

why.copy: The project suits buyers who want golf, restaurants and Puerto Banús nearby, without the upkeep of a large villa.
points: Second-home and investment-minded buyers seeking Golf Valley convenience.
A smaller home that is easier to own in one of Marbella's most popular areas.
Nueva Andalucía puts golf, services and Puerto Banús within easy reach.
The best option depends on the home's position and which units are currently released.

architecture.headlineHtml: Well-designed homes that are easy to enjoy
copy: The homes use simple layouts, modern finishes and useful outdoor space.
They are made for buyers who want a comfortable Marbella base without a lot of maintenance.
highlights: Amenity and Golf Valley access as part of daily life.

residences.headlineHtml: Suites and townhouses close to Marbella life
residences.copy: The right home depends on availability, direction and how you plan to use it: short stays, longer visits or rental. Ask us for the latest options.

items.name: Garden Suites
features: More outdoor usability for longer stays.
Practical for buyers with guests or family.

features: Strong lifestyle base close to golf and Puerto Banús.

privateViewing.headlineHtml: Take a closer look at Golf Valley
privateViewing.copy: Get the latest floorplans and availability, then let us help you compare the homes and next steps.
insights: Golf Valley convenience, restaurants and Puerto Banús access.
Any rental plan should be checked against the exact home and current local rules.

lifestyle.copy: Daily life is easy and social, with golf, restaurants, services, Puerto Banús and an international community all nearby.
panels: Several courses and clubs make this a good base for year-round golf.
Restaurants and services are close enough for regular use.
The homes suit buyers who want a comfortable base without villa-level maintenance.

location.copy: Nueva Andalucía is one of Marbella's best-known areas, popular for its golf courses, restaurants, international community and proximity to Puerto Banús.

investment.copy: The location, easy ownership and steady interest in Nueva Andalucía may support future demand. Any rental plan should still be checked against local rules, seasonality and the exact home.
cards: A small release of well-positioned homes can sell quickly.
The latest floorplans and availability help you compare the right homes before viewing.
Nueva Andalucía is popular with lifestyle buyers, golfers and renters.
The homes may suit both personal stays and rental, subject to the right checks.

trustDossier.copy: We review the home type, exact location, rental rules, delivery and day-to-day ownership before you move forward.
cards: We compare suites and townhouses based on how you plan to use them.
We check the practical distance to golf, Puerto Banús and services.
We discuss rental potential alongside the current rules.
We can compare the project with other easy-to-own homes around Marbella.
